The '''speeder shop''' on [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]] was a garage owned and operated by [[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]] and [[Jord Dusat]] during the early years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It was here that the two created the ''[[White Witch]]'', a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] that Joben later used to win the [[Boonta Speeder Race]].

When the two racers accidentally discovered [[Tig Fromm]]'s [[Tig Fromm's base|secret base]] while racing in the [[Vaj Desert]], the gangster dispatched [[muscle droid]]s to the speeder shop to abduct them. Thall had already left, but the droids captured Jord. Upon returning to the shop, Thall was told by [[Kea Moll]] what had happened to Jord. They soon came under attack from more muscle droids who had sabotaged Thall's speeder to prevent his escape. Acting quickly, Kea and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] activated the ''White Witch'', allowing the group to escape.
